name: Low-fat, Low-Sodium Substitute for Cream of Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup unsalted instant chicken bouillon granules
2 tablespoons dried onion flakes (or 1 teaspoon onion powder)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together.
2. When ready to use, mix 1/3 cup of the soup substitute with 1 1/4 cups of water to equal the consistency of 1 can of cream of chicken soup.
Notes: This recipe was originally found on www.mayohealth.org/mayo/recipe/htm/soup5.htm and includes a complete nutritional and calorie comparison with a can of Cream of Chicken Soup. It is intended for use in casseroles.
